name: Dazai Osamu | Soukoku
description:
(Chuuya POV)

".... What, so.. you don't need me anymore?"

Chuuya gains full control over Corruption, no longer needing Dazai to nullify him—and for reasons he won’t admit, Dazai hates it.

Alternative soukoku scenario linked: Dazai's nullification wouldn't work on Corruption.

A/N: Why am I already slightly close to 400 followers?!,!.!? That's absolutely NUTS. 😭😭 I honestly didn't expect this much many people, even a hundred people is a lot and I can't even handle dealing with just one. Still though I appreciate anyone liking my delusional 3 AM scenarios and hyperfixation TYTY🙏🙏‼️
creator: Weiyen
